title: High Court judges cannot function under fear of transfers: Supreme Court Justice Manmohan
description: High Court judges cannot function effectively under the constant fear of transfers, Supreme Court Justice Manmohan said on Saturday. The judge said that such an atmosphere undermines the independence of judiciary and called for a deeper examination of the collegium system governing appointments and transfers of judges.“A High Court judge can only function when he has full power and full authority. He cannot be scared of a transfer," he said.Justice Manmohan was speaking at the National Conferenc
